metadata.name: Resolve a Work Order Billing Dispute

description: A property owner is disputing the cost of a plumbing repair, claiming it was too high. The manager must investigate.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the work order and the vendor's invoice for the disputed repair.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up all documentation for the job.

nodes.task_description: Review the invoice for details: hours worked, materials used, and rate charged.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent analyzes the invoice for reasonableness and accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Contact the vendor to discuss the charges and, if appropriate, negotiate a reduction. Communicate the resolution to the owner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates with the vendor and resolves the dispute with the owner.
